Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

title: 277-Senior Cyber Security Specialist
description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
As the sole dedicated cybersecurity specialist, the primary objective is to act as the MoF’s internal "ethical hacker" and security architect. The role aims to:
Proactively identify and exploit vulnerabilities in the MoF’s networks, applications, and financial systems through rigorous, hands-on penetration testing.
Establish foundational security monitoring and incident response capabilities in the absence of a traditional SOC.
Provide expert technical guidance to the broader ICT team to remediate identified vulnerabilities.
Build a resilient security posture from the ground up, balancing deep technical execution with strategic risk management.

Job Requirements
Scope of Work and Key Responsibilities
Given the standalone nature of this role, the Specialist must be highly self-motivated, capable of deep technical execution, and skilled at prioritizing high-risk areas.
Heavy Penetration Testing & Offensive Security (Core Focus)
Conduct regular, in-depth, hands-on penetration testing on the MoF’s internal/external networks, web applications, APIs, mobile applications, and critical financial systems.
Perform advanced manual testing to identify complex vulnerabilities (e.g., business logic flaws, authentication bypasses, injection attacks) that automated scanners miss.
Conduct social engineering and phishing campaigns to test the human element of the MoF’s security posture.
Vendor Management: While executing continuous internal pen-testing, design the scope for and manage external third-party vendors for comprehensive, enterprise-wide annual penetration tests.
Vulnerability Management & Remediation
Deploy, configure, and manage automated vulnerability scanning tools across the MoF’s infrastructure.
Analyze scan results, filter out false positives, and prioritize vulnerabilities based on the specific threat landscape of the financial sector.
Work directly with system administrators, network engineers, and application developers to verify and validate the remediation of identified flaws.
Foundational Security Monitoring & Incident Response
design, implement, and manage a centralized log management and basic SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) solution.
Act as the primary (Tier 1, 2, and 3) Incident Responder. Investigate security alerts, contain breaches, eradicate threats, and recover systems during a cyber incident.
Develop and maintain automated alerting rules to notify the Specialist and ICT management of critical security events.
Security Architecture & Automation
Advise the ICT Directorate on secure architecture for new financial systems, , and network expansions (Security by Design).
Develop scripts and automate repetitive security tasks (e.g., using Python, Bash, or PowerShell) to maximize efficiency and scale security efforts without additional headcount.
Key Deliverables
Penetration Testing Reports: Comprehensive, technical, and executive-level reports following every internal penetration test, including proof-of-concept exploits and step-by-step remediation guides.
Vulnerability Dashboard: A continuously updated, automated dashboard showing the MoF’s vulnerability posture, aging of critical vulnerabilities, and remediation SLA compliance.
Incident Response Plan (IRP): A documented and tested IRP tailored for a standalone responder, including clear escalation matrices to external law enforcement or emergency IT support.
Security Monitoring Baseline: Successful deployment and tuning of a centralized logging/SIEM solution with active alerts for critical financial systems within the first [6 months].
Quarterly Security Posture Report: An executive summary for the Director of ICT detailing the threat landscape, tests conducted, critical risks discovered, and remediation progress.
Reporting and Coordination
Direct Reporting: Reports directly to the Director of ICT.
Internal Coordination: Works closely with Network Administrators, Database Administrators, and Software Developers to ensure vulnerabilities are patched without disrupting critical treasury operations.
External Coordination: Acts as the technical point of contact for external penetration testing firms, managed security service providers.
Qualifications and Experience
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or a closely related field.
Experience:
Exactly/At least Seven (7) years of progressive, hands-on professional experience in Cybersecurity, with a heavy emphasis on technical execution rather than pure management.
Minimum of three (3) to four (4) years of dedicated, hands-on experience specifically in Penetration Testing and Offensive Security.
Proven experience conducting pen tests on complex environments, specifically web applications, APIs, and network infrastructure.
Experience operating as a standalone security practitioner or building security programs from scratch is highly desirable.
Certifications:
Mandatory (Offensive Security): Must hold a highly respected, practical penetration testing certification such as:
OSCP (Offensive Security Certified Professional) - Highly Preferred
OSEP, OSWE, or PEN-300.
Alternatives: CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or CompTIA PenTest+ (only if accompanied by strong proven practical experience).
Desirable (General/Defensive): CISSP, CISM, or BTL1 (Blue Team Level 1) to complement the offensive skills with governance and defensive knowledge.
Required Skills and Competencies
Technical Skills (Heavy Offensive Focus):
Expert-level proficiency with penetration testing frameworks and tools (e.g., Burp Suite Professional, Metasploit, Cobalt Strike, Nmap, Nessus, SQLmap).
Deep understanding of the OWASP Top 10, SANS Top 25, and advanced exploitation techniques.
Strong scripting and automation skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell) to write custom exploits, automate scanning, and parse logs.
Solid understanding of defensive security, network protocols, and how to configure log aggregation tools (e.g., Splunk, ELK, Wazuh) for a solo analyst.
Soft Skills:
Self-Starter & Time Management: Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks ruthlessly, and manage time effectively without direct supervision.
Technical Translation: Ability to explain complex, highly technical exploitation chains to non-technical financial executives and translate them into business risks.
High Integrity: Unquestionable ethical standards

title: Senior Backend Java Developer
description:
Role Summary
The Senior Backend Java Developer at AurumPay is responsible for designing, building, and launching scalable backend services, FinTech solutions, and API integrations. This role connects AurumPay’s core systems with third-party services such as mobile operators, e-money providers, and digital wallets, focusing on secure, high-performance server-side logic.Key Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Backend Development & Innovation
• Lead backend development for FinTech projects including digital wallets, payment engines, and automation tools.
• Propose and prototype new features to improve system performance and reliability.
• Ensure continuous development and enhancement of the existing AurumPay Mobile Money system backend.
2. Software Quality & Database Management
• Oversee backend development using Java, Spring Boot, and related libraries (Hibernate, Spring Security).
• Ensure all services meet security, performance, and compliance standards.
• Design and optimize Oracle databases; write complex SQL queries and manage database migrations.
3. API & Third-Party Integrations
• Build and support integrations using REST, SOAP, ISO 8583, and other industry-standard protocols.
• Integrate with mobile operators, digital wallets, EMIs, payment switches, and gateways.
4. System Design & Team Leadership
• Design scalable backend architectures and integration plans based on business needs.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to build resilient solutions.
• Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to junior developers.
• Promote agile methodologies and CI/CD practices.

Job Requirements
Mandatory:
• Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot (Spring MVC, Spring Data, Spring Security).
• Proven experience building REST/SOAP APIs and integrations using ISO 8583 and other industry protocols.
• Deep understanding of microservices architecture and full SDLC.
• Hands-on experience integrating with wallets, telecom operators, EMIs, or financial switches.
• Strong proficiency with Oracle databases (complex queries, indexing, performance tuning).

title: 2. Female Trainer – Digital Marketing, Social Media, Photography and Branding
description:
About ACE/PPC
Premium Performance Consulting (PPC) is a specialized Afghan consulting firm providing monitoring, evaluation, third-party monitoring (TPM), independent assessments, verification services, research, data management, and quality assurance solutions for development and humanitarian programs across Afghanistan. PPC has supported a wide range of assignments for UN agencies, international organizations, NGOs, and government institutions, delivering evidence-based insights, performance measurement, beneficiary verification, and accountability services that strengthen program effectiveness and decision-making.
PPC serves as a strategic domain partner within the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) Ecosystem . Established in 2012, ACE is a leading Afghan consulting and development services organization with nationwide operations and regional offices across Afghanistan. ACE specializes in private sector development, business development services (BDS), value chain development, livelihoods, workforce development, capacity building, economic inclusion, research, and institutional strengthening, supporting governments, development partners, and private sector actors in achieving sustainable development outcomes.
The advertised position is with the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) and will contribute to ACE's portfolio of consulting and development assignments. Through the ACE Ecosystem partnership model, the position will benefit from the complementary expertise of PPC and other ecosystem partners, combining ACE's programmatic leadership and technical delivery capacity with PPC's strengths in monitoring, evaluation, verification, and quality assurance to deliver high-quality, evidence-driven development solutions across Afghanistan.
Interested applicants should submit:
Updated CV
Cover letter clearly mentioning the trainer position(s) applied for
Relevant sample training materials, portfolio, or evidence of similar assignments, if available
Contact details of two professional references

Job Descriptions
Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE), through the ACE/PPC Ecosystem, is implements capacity-building projects aimed at strengthening women-owned and women-led businesses in Afghanistan. The projects provide practical training and follow-up mentoring/coaching support to women entrepreneurs in key business development areas, including business registration, legal compliance, taxation, digital marketing, procurement readiness, access to finance, and business growth.
ACE/PPC Ecosystem is seeking qualified and experienced female trainers for the following thematic areas.
Purpose of the Position: The Trainer will deliver practical training and mentoring to women-owned and women-led businesses on digital marketing, social media use, product photography, branding, content development, and basic digital marketing planning.

Job Requirements
Main Training and Mentoring Areas
· Use of social media platforms for small business promotion.
· Basic digital tools for business visibility and customer engagement.
· Product photography using available/simple tools.
· Branding, messaging, and content development for women-owned businesses.
· Preparation of simple digital marketing plans and posting schedules.
Key Responsibilities
· Develop, review, and adapt training materials related to digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Prepare session plans, agendas, exercises, live demonstrations, and practical examples.
· Deliver interactive and practical training sessions to women entrepreneurs.
· Facilitate hands-on exercises on social media pages, content design, product photos, branding, and customer engagement.
· Conduct pre- and post-training assessments, where required.
· Provide practical templates and tools, including content calendars, simple brand guides, caption samples, and digital marketing plan templates.
· Provide follow-up mentoring/coaching to selected participants on improving their online presence and business visibility.
· Support participants in applying digital marketing practices to their own products and services.
· Document participant progress, key challenges, and success stories, where applicable.
· Coordinate with ACE/PPC Ecosystem project staff on logistics, attendance, documentation, and reporting.
· Prepare brief training and mentoring reports, including observations, participant feedback, challenges, and recommendations.
· Ensure all sessions are respectful, inclusive, culturally appropriate, and gender-sensitive.
Expected Deliverables
· Training agenda and session plan.
· Final/adapted training materials on digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Practical templates/tools, such as digital marketing plan, content calendar, branding checklist, and product photography checklist.
· Pre- and post-test tools, where required.
· Participant attendance lists.
· Training completion report.
· Mentoring/coaching session notes and participant progress updates.
· Photos/videos and other training evidence, as required.
Required Qualifications and Experience
· Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, ICT, Business Administration, Media, Design, Development Studies, or another relevant field. Master’s degree is preferred.
· Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in digital marketing, social media management, branding, photography, business development, entrepreneurship support, or MSME mentoring/coaching.
· Proven experience delivering training and/or coaching to women entrepreneurs, MSMEs, private sector actors, or business groups.
· Strong practical knowledge of social media platforms, digital tools, content development, product photography, and small business branding.
· Excellent facilitation, presentation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
· Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto is required; working knowledge of English is an advantage.
· Ability to travel to target provinces, if required.
· Previous experience with UN agencies, NGOs, consulting firms, or donor-funded projects is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified female candidates are invited to submit their applications to:
Email: business@pre-performance.com
Subject Line: Application – Female Trainer / [Mention Training Area]
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for written test, technical assessment, or interview.

Submission Email
business@pre-performance.com
Apply

title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines

title: System/ Customer Support Officer (Night Shift)
description:
Role Summary
The System/Customer Support Officer is responsible for 24/7 monitoring of UA Telecom’s wireless network devices, recording and resolving customer complaints and technical incidents through the support lifecycle, and performing multi-level troubleshooting across network and customer systems to ensure service continuity, SLA compliance, and uninterrupted service delivery.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Record and manage customer complaint history in the designated system, ensuring continuous follow-up until full resolution.
2. Log and maintain records of site failures, power issues, and network downtime for SLA tracking and reconciliation.
3. Monitor network performance tools (Red EMCO) for microwave and InfiNet devices, including ping latency and interference analysis, and support corrective actions to ensure timely issue resolution.
4. Monitor Air Control Alerting systems for network devices including device online/offline status, pole movement alerts, interference issues, hotspot connectivity failures, CCQ degradation, and bitrate issues, and take corrective or escalated action as required.
5. Maintain overall health monitoring of network devices in accordance with standard points.
6. Provide second-line and limited third-line technical support for customer and network-related issues.
7. Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to BTS sites, PTP links, wireless sectors, switches, routers, and other network infrastructure.
8. Perform troubleshooting and configuration support for network switches, including implementation of advanced features when required.
9. Resolve customer-side issues related to CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) and LAN networks using remote access tools.
10. Support firmware and IOS/software upgrades for wireless and network devices based on vendor updates and operational requirements.
11. Identify, analyze, and resolve customer connectivity issues remotely using diagnostic and remote support tools.
12. Generate and share weekly reports of inactive/non-usage customers with Sales, CRM, and Collections teams for further action.
13. Escalate bandwidth and capacity-related issues to CRM and Sales teams for review and adjustment of customer packages.
14. Maintain accurate records of customer installations in the designated database, including customer name, connected base station details, router model, bandwidth allocation (day/night), contact details (POC), and technical configuration information.
15. Record and manage demo customers’ complaints and ensure follow-up until resolution in the designated system.
16. Maintain hotspot user records in centralized databases, including credentials, package details, validity, and access point information.
17. Update internal communication groups (e.g., WhatsApp groups) for new installations, link termination, and network incident notifications, and inform customers of urgent technical issues when required.
18. Coordinate and arrange field teams for on-site visits when remote troubleshooting is not sufficient.
19. Maintain complete documentation of system monitoring events, incidents, and customer complaints in designated databases.
20. Respond to all customer inquiries, calls, emails, and complaints in a professional and timely manner.
21. Communicate planned and unplanned maintenance activities, outages, and service issues to customers via email, phone, or messaging platforms, ensuring confirmation and status updates.
22. Schedule and communicate maintenance activities for base stations, ensuring customers are notified at least 48 hours in advance.
23. Prepare shift-wise reports detailing completed tasks, ongoing incidents, and pending issues.
24. Ensure proper handover of all active tickets, incidents, and operational tasks to the next shift for continuity of service.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (BCS).
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in IT/network operations, preferably in ISP or telecom environments.
Strong communication skills with ability to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English (spoken and written).
Working knowledge of Linux operating systems and programming/scripting fundamentals.
Work Conditions
This role operates in a 24/7 shift-based NOC environment at UA Telecom. With full accountability for continuous system monitoring and customer service operations. It requires real-time incident detection, immediate response, and strict escalation management to ensure service continuity and rapid resolution of network and customer issues.
The position requires rotational shifts, including nights, weekends, and public holidays, and demands high responsiveness in a fast-paced, time-critical environment.
Desirable Qualifications/Plus Points:
· Certifications such as Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA), Cisco Certified Network Associate – Wireless (CCNA Wireless), Cisco Certified Network Professional (CCNP), and Microsoft Certified IT Professional (MCITP) are highly advantageous for this role.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by July 31, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-CSO-2149-J - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

description:
About Jahan University
پوهنتون جهان یکی ازپوهنتون های معتبر در افغانستان است که در سرک سه کارته نو شهر کابل فعالیت می‌کند. این پوهنتون با هدف ارائه آموزش عالی معیاری در رشته‌های مختلف علمی و مسلکی ایجاد شده و در بخش‌های چون کمپیوترساینس، اقتصاد، حقوق، طب معالجوی، و شرعیات به سطح لیسانس و ماستری فعالیت می‌نماید. پوهنتون جهان همچنان در بخش تحقیق، آموزش عملی و همکاری‌های علمی تلاش دارد تا زمینه رشد علمی محصلان را فراهم سازد

Job Description
۱-رهنمایی اعضای کادر علمی و محصلان طبق مقرره تحصیلات عالی؛
۲-ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی اعضای کادر علمی و سایر دانشمندان و ابراز نظر در رابطه به آنها؛
۳-اشتراک فعال در محافل علمی منحیث گرداننده، سخنران و یا اشتراک کننده؛
۴-اشتراک فعال در کمیته ها، مجالس و شورا های علمی؛
۵-سهمگیری مسولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و موسسه تحصیلات عالی مربوطه به منظور انکشاف پیشرفت علمی و حفظ منافع و مصلحت های موسسه؛
۶-ارتقای سویه ی دانش به ویژه در رشته ی اختصاصی و کسب مهارت های مانند: آموزش یک زبان معتبر بین المللی و کمپیوتر؛
۷-تهییه لکچر نوت ها و رهنمود کار های علمی – ساحوی و لابراتواری؛
۸-رهبری و اشتراک در تالیف کتابهای درسی، ممد درسی و مرجع؛
۱۰- عضو فعال در تحقیقات علمی؛
۱۱-اشتراک در امتحانات ورودی محصلان جدیدشمول؛
۱۲-سایر فعالیت ها و وظایف که در قانون تحصیلات عالی و مؤسسه تحصیلات عالی جهان پیش بینی شده است؛

Job Requirements
حد اقل دارنده تحصیلات عالی به سویه ماستر در رشته های اقتصاد،کمپیوتر ساینس، شرعیات،
حد اقل سه سال تجربه کاری در بخش تدریس در سطح پوهنتون را دارا باشد .
توانایی و مهارت برنامه های آفیس کمپیوتر راداشته باشد
تسلط کامل به زبان های ملی (دری و پشتو) و انگلیسی بلدیت داشته باشد.
توانایی رهبری و پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی را داشته باشد.

Submission Guideline
از عمومی متقاضیان گرامی که واجد شرایط هستند، خلص سوانح خویش همرای اسکن اسناد تحصیلی،تذکره تابعیت و اسکن قرارداد خط/سند تجربه کاری را با نوشتن نام پوهنحی مربوطه و ذکر ووکنسی نمبر به ایمیل آدرس های ذیل ارسال بدارند یا هارد آنرا تسلیم آمریت منابع بشری این نهاد تسلیم نمااید.

Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

title: Customer Service Agent - English Translator.
description: About Speenkai Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success. Job Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives. In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties & Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities 1. Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments. 2. Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift. 3. Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule. 4. Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email 5. Ability to enter tickets into the CRM Job Requirements Job Requirements · Fluent in English and must possess excellent verbal and written skills. • Motivated self-starter • Office work experience • Ability to multitask in fast paced environment is crucial. • Capable of typing 45+ words per minute necessary • Customer Service skills and Conflict Resolution skills. • Telemarketing experience is a plus • Microsoft Office Products Submission Guideline This link will redirect you to an online assessment. There a video question at the end. If you don not answer, you application will not be accepted. The assessment is around 50 minutes long. Find a quiet place and stable internet. title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
Apply
